summary: Detail Mode (Modo detalle/lineas) feature fully tested. Backend: 18/18 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All toggle functionality working on ComercialPage, CreditosPage, and CuentaDetalle. Toggle switches between header view (orders/invoices) and lines view (product-level data). KPIs remain consistent across both modes. Drawer only appears in header mode.

issues: Console warnings about 'Encountered two children with the same key' - likely duplicate order_id values in paginated data. Not a functional issue but should be addressed for React best practices.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/comercial/lines requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/comercial/lines returns paginated line-level data with metrics
Backend: GET /api/comercial/lines row structure includes line_id, modelo_display, qty, price_unit, subtotal, talla, color
Backend: GET /api/comercial/lines metrics match /api/comercial/orders metrics (KPI consistency)
Backend: GET /api/comercial/lines supports doc_tipo filter (SALE/RESERVA)
Backend: GET /api/comercial/lines supports date filters (fecha_desde, fecha_hasta)
Backend: GET /api/comercial/lines pagination works correctly
Backend: GET /api/creditos/lines requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/creditos/lines returns paginated line-level data with metrics
Backend: GET /api/creditos/lines row structure includes invoice_id, invoice_number, qty, price_unit, price_subtotal
Backend: GET /api/creditos/lines metrics match /api/creditos/invoices metrics (KPI consistency)
Backend: GET /api/creditos/lines supports state filter
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/{id}/ventas/lines requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/{id}/ventas/lines returns line-level data for account
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/{id}/creditos/lines requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/{id}/creditos/lines returns line-level data for account
Backend: KPI consistency verified with filters applied (comercial)
Backend: KPI consistency verified with filters applied (creditos)
Frontend: ComercialPage toggle (data-testid='toggle-detail-mode') exists and works
Frontend: ComercialPage shows orders-table in header mode
Frontend: ComercialPage shows lines-table in detail mode
Frontend: ComercialPage LINEAS badge appears when detail mode enabled
Frontend: CreditosPage toggle (data-testid='toggle-detail-mode') exists and works
Frontend: CreditosPage shows invoices-table (Facturas a Credito) in header mode
Frontend: CreditosPage shows lines-table (Lineas de producto) in detail mode
Frontend: CreditosPage KPIs consistent (FACTURAS: 5,390, UNIDADES: 273,831, SALDO: S/266,615.50)
Frontend: CuentaDetalle toggle bar (data-testid='detail-mode-toggle-bar') exists
Frontend: CuentaDetalle shows 'Mostrando cabeceras de ordenes/facturas' in header mode
Frontend: CuentaDetalle shows 'Mostrando lineas de producto individuales' in detail mode
Frontend: CuentaDetalle Ventas tab shows line-level data with Fecha, Orden, Modelo, Marca, Talla, Color, Qty, P.Unit, Subtotal
Frontend: CuentaDetalle Creditos tab shows line-level data in detail mode
Frontend: CuentaDetalle Creditos tab shows invoice headers in header mode
Frontend: Drawer does NOT appear when clicking rows in detail mode (correct behavior)
Frontend: Drawer ONLY appears in header mode
action_items: MINOR: Fix duplicate React key warnings in ComercialPage by ensuring unique keys for rows (use line_id + order_id combination instead of just order_id)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend endpoints correctly use header-level metrics for KPI consistency (lines endpoint queries header view for metrics)
Line-level data includes all expected product attributes: modelo_display, marca, talla, color, qty, price_unit, subtotal
Frontend toggle uses correct data-testid attributes for testing
CuentaDetalle page correctly fetches /api/cuentas/{id}/ventas/lines and /api/cuentas/{id}/creditos/lines when detail mode enabled
Drawer logic correctly checks !detailMode before rendering OrderLinesDrawer/InvoiceLinesDrawer
seed_data_creation: None - used existing PostgreSQL data from crm.v_comercial_mov_flat and crm.v_credito_flat views
context_for_next_testing_agent: Detail Mode (Modo detalle/lineas) feature verified. Backend: /api/comercial/lines and /api/creditos/lines endpoints return paginated line-level data with header-level metrics for KPI consistency. Account-level endpoints /api/cuentas/{id}/ventas/lines and /api/cuentas/{id}/creditos/lines also working. Frontend: Toggle (data-testid='toggle-detail-mode' on global pages, data-testid='detail-mode-toggle-bar' on CuentaDetalle) switches between header and lines views. Lines tables use data-testid='lines-table'. KPIs remain consistent. Drawer only appears in header mode. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_detail_mode_lines.py (18 tests). Note: Minor React key warning for duplicate order_ids in paginated data.
